mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN MRK_ITM_SEQ = 1 THEN MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END ) AS LESSON_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN MRK_ITM_SEQ = 2 THEN MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END ) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN MRK_ITM_SEQ = 3 THEN MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END ) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN MRK_ITM_SEQ = 4 THEN MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END ) AS TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN MRK_ITM_SEQ = 5 THEN MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END ) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN MRK_ITM_SEQ = 6 THEN MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END ) AS FORUM_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN MRK_ITM_SEQ = 7 THEN MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END ) AS QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN MRK_ITM_SEQ = 8 THEN MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END ) AS RESH_SCORE_RATIO , SUM(MRK_RFLTRT) AS TOTAL_SCORE_RATIO FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
SELECT SBJCT_TYCD AS crsTypeCd FROM TB_LMS_CRS WHERE CRS_ID = ( SELECT X.CRS_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT X WHERE X.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} )
SELECT SCR_ITM_ID , SBJCT_ID , MRK_ITM_SEQ , MRK_TYCD , MRK_ITMNM , MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ORDER BY MRK_ITM_SEQ
SELECT '' AS SCR_ITM_ID , '' AS SBJCT_ID , MRK_ITM_SEQ , MRK_TYCD , MRK_ITMNM , MRK_RFLTRT FROM MRK_ITM_STNG WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND SBJCT_TYCD = #{crsTypeCd} ORDER BY MRK_ITM_SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF( SCR_ITM_ID , SBJCT_ID , MRK_ITM_SEQ , MRK_TYCD , MRK_ITMNM , MRK_ITM_EXPLN , MRK_RFLTRT , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) SELECT CONCAT('SCIT_', #{crsCreCd},SUBSTR(MRK_ITM_STNG_ID, -2)) , #{crsCreCd} AS SBJCT_ID , MRK_ITM_SEQ , MRK_TYCD , MRK_ITMNM , MRK_ITM_EXPLN , #{scoreRatio} AS MRK_RFLTRT , #{rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID , FN_DTTM() AS FRST_INQ_DTTM , #{mdfrId} AS MDFR_ID , FN_DTTM() AS MOD_DTTM FROM MRK_ITM_STNG WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND SBJCT_TYCD = #{crsTypeCd} AND MRK_ITM_SEQ = #{scoreItemOrder}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : GradeDAO.listStdGradeStatus 설 명 : 성적입력현황 > 성적처리현황 팝업 > 수강생 목록 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY B.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , A.SBJCT_ID , A.STD_ID , B.USER_ID , B.USERNM , A.SCYR , B.DEPTNM , B.SCHREG_GBN , NVL(D.EXCH_TOT_SCR, 0) AS EXCH_TOT_SCR , NVL(D.LST_SCR, 0) AS LST_SCR , NVL(D.SCR_GRDCD, '-') AS SCR_GRDCD , NVL(D.RNK, 0) AS RNK FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT D ON A.STD_ID = D.STD_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
